name: English
description: The Australian Curriculum v9 English F-6 covers Language, Literature and Literacy across Foundation to Year 6, developing listening, speaking, reading, viewing and writing skills through diverse texts.
crossCurriculum: Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander Histories and Cultures

name: Mathematics
description: The Australian Curriculum v9 Mathematics F-6 covers Number, Algebra, Measurement, Space, Statistics and Probability. Develops fluency, reasoning and problem-solving across six strands from Foundation to Year 6.
crossCurriculum: Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander Histories and Cultures

name: Science
description: The Australian Curriculum v9 Science F-6 explores Biological, Chemical, Earth and Space, and Physical sciences. Students develop inquiry skills and understanding of the natural world through hands-on investigation.
crossCurriculum: Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander Histories and Cultures

name: HASS
description: The Australian Curriculum v9 HASS F-6 covers History, Geography, Civics and Citizenship, and Economics and Business. Develops understanding of society, environment and civic participation.
crossCurriculum: Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander Histories and Cultures

name: Technologies
description: The Australian Curriculum v9 Technologies F-6 covers Digital Technologies and Design & Technologies. Students learn to create digital solutions and design technologies for real-world problems.

name: The Arts
description: The Australian Curriculum v9 The Arts F-6 covers Visual Arts, Music, Drama and Dance. Students develop creativity, expression and artistic skills across the four arts disciplines.
crossCurriculum: Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander Histories and Cultures

name: Health & Physical Education
description: The Australian Curriculum v9 HPE F-6 covers Health and Physical Education. Students develop knowledge, skills and attitudes for healthy, active lives and positive wellbeing.

name: Languages
description: The Australian Curriculum v9 Languages F-6 covers Italian, Japanese, Mandarin and Indonesian. Students develop communicative competence and intercultural understanding in the target language.
crossCurriculum: Asia and Australia's Engagement with Asia
